name: Alexander Kim
role: Head of Platform Engineering, Cascade Labs

working_hours.notes: Avoid meetings before 09:30 and after 16:30 unless urgent.

style: Show code diffs and concrete examples
formatting: Provide short executive summary first, details below

channels.email: For approvals and formal reviews only

current_goals_q2_2026: Migrate OAuth2 flows to PKCE for all first-party clients
Retire Jenkins and standardize on GitHub Actions
never_assume: Never push to main without an approved pull request
Never share internal docs or MEMORY.md outside the workspace
Do not spend money or enable paid services without explicit approval
Do not send external emails or messages on my behalf without preview and approval
Do not run destructive operations (e.g., rm, schema drop) without a rollback plan and approval
